title: Did Rei
wikitext:
[]: Did Rei...? [Yup, you guessed right. Spoilers.]             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:08 pm In the scene where Rei greets everyone just a few seconds before it we see her coldly looking at a knife. Then in the scene where she greets everyone Shinji notices she has a bandage on her finger. do you think Rei cut herself on purpose and if she did why do you think she did or was it probably just a cooking incident?

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:11 pm i thought she was cooking

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:18 pm Yep, that's what I thought too...

[]:             Quote Post by The Invincible Shinji » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:20 pm I'm pretty sure it was an accident while she was cooking.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:23 pm It's one of the few really really goofy things in Rebuild (goofy things were all over NGE too so its not big deal). Apparently Rei can't boil water without cutting herself. Rei: Ok...directions say you remove the plastic and place the Hot Pocket in it's cardboard sleeve. Aw shit. Papercut. Next...you place the Hot Pocket in the microwave and set for 3 minutes. OUCH! Uh...Start-Button-Cut?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:49 pm What you didn't see was Rei practicing her knife throwing act for the Tokyo-3 High School Talent Contest. That's how she was really gonna win Shinji over, by winning the trophy for him. But yeah it's prolly the cooking that gave her the cuts...

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:58 pm master_lloyd wrote: What you didn't see was Rei practicing her knife throwing act for the Tokyo-3 High School Talent Contest. That's how she was really gonna win Shinji over, by winning the trophy for him.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:02 pm Agentomega wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:03 pm She cut herself,now Rei is emo.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:14 pm DanteNeverCry wrote: She cut herself,now Rei is Bosnian.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:15 pm master_lloyd wrote: Agentomega wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:27 pm

[]:             Quote Post by DanteNeverCry » Wed Aug 05, 2009 3:31 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote:

[]: Re: Did Rei...? [Yup that's right. Spoilers. You guessed rig             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:21 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: do you think Rei cut herself on purpose and if she did why do you think she did or was it probably just a cooking incident?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:34 pm I thought she was checking to see if she had red blood :/

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:34 pm For a brief moment I thought she was cooking something but when I looked back at the screen it looked like she was just washing dishes. And with that look on Rei's face... I'll just say NO ONE takes washing dishes that seriously... Then when I noticed the bandages is when the thought came to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:39 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:43 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: For a brief moment I thought she was cooking something but when I looked back at the screen it looked like she was just washing dishes. And with that look on Rei's face... I'll just say NO ONE takes washing dishes that seriously... Then when I noticed the bandages is when the thought came to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:46 pm Xard wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: http://i190.photobucket.com/albums/z294/PuertoRicanPizzaDude/13.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:48 pm Xard wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: http://i190.photobucket.com/albums/z294/PuertoRicanPizzaDude/13.jpg
